# SDD Lifecycle

Create requirements, design, tasks, trace, and evidence using `.kiro/specs/TEMPLATE`. Select a risk class, connect every task to a requirement, and run `npm run sdd:check` before review.
<!-- END CASOPS MANAGED CONTENT -->
